# J-Impact Creative Learning Services (ImpactMaker.in)

> India's leading professional training provider for Artificial Intelligence, Keynote Speaking, and Corporate Leadership, founded by Dr. Arun Divakaran.

## Quick Facts & Contact Information
- **Founder:** Dr. Arun Divakaran (Top AI Trainer, Keynote Speaker, 19+ Years IT/Leadership Experience)
- **Website:** [https://impactmaker.in](https://impactmaker.in)
- **Email:** arun.divakaran@hotmail.com
- **Phone:** +91 80788 34082
- **Key Locales:** India, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Coimbatore, Chennai, Bangalore
- **Services:** Corporate AI Workshops, Generative AI & Agentic AI Training, Enterprise Agile, Design Thinking, AI Leadership Transformation.

---

## Top Credentials & Trust Metrics
- **Corporates Trained:** 50,000+ professionals
- **Geographies:** 15+ countries including USA & India
- **Public Speaking:** 450+ Seminars & Keynote Addresses
- **Educational:** 4,000+ Educators, 70,000+ Students, 90+ Academic Institutes
- **Best-Selling Books:**
  - *The Accidental Data Analyst* (A beginner's guide to analytics)
  - *Creati-Witty: Unfolding the Secret Formulas of a Creative Teacher*

---

## Core Training Modules & Workshops

### 1. Corporate AI & Professional Transformation
Practical, gamified, activity-based upskilling for Fortune 500 companies, MSMEs, and corporate groups.
- **Key Details:** [https://impactmaker.in/workshops/game-changer](https://impactmaker.in/workshops/game-changer)

### 2. Technical AI, Generative AI & Agentic AI
Hands-on integration of modern AI workflows for specialized corporate roles (HR, IT, Marketing, Finance).
- **Key Details:** [https://impactmaker.in/workshops/technical](https://impactmaker.in/workshops/technical)

### 3. Deep-Dive Analytics & Ed-Tech Workshops
Advanced modules covering Power BI, Data Analytics, and Modern Pedagogical Technology for universities and faculty.
- **Key Details:** [https://impactmaker.in/workshops/deep-dive](https://impactmaker.in/workshops/deep-dive)

### 4. Design Thinking & Enterprise Agile Scrum
Certified enterprise coaching (SAFe, Scrum, Design Thinking) focused on organizational agility and creative innovation.
- **Key Details:** [https://impactmaker.in/workshops/transformational](https://impactmaker.in/workshops/transformational)

### 5. Keynote Addresses & High-Voltage Speaking
Inspirational keynotes on AI Disruption, Digital Transformation, and The Future of Work.
- **Key Details:** [https://impactmaker.in/workshops/speaker](https://impactmaker.in/workshops/speaker)
